channel.title: Do things, tell people – Royce Haynes - books

item.title: The Fifth Season
item.description: I’ve never read a sci-fi book until last weekend. I cracked open The Fifth Season by N.K. Jemisin before going to bed and got 3 hours of rest that night. How I came to learn about the book was through a good friend, who raved enough about it that I decided to borrow the first two books in the series to catch up with him.
item.dc:creator: Royce Haynes
